generated_oml:
@prefix DTDFVocab: https://w3id.org/dtdf# . # Return code: 1 | Stderr:
@prefix base: http://www.example.org/base# .

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures horizontal position of the cart along the gantry track"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures vertical position of the hoist"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionSensor
]

instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionSensor
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series swing angle measurements from hoist motion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase, GrafanaDashboard
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase, GrafanaDashboard
]

instance CartPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series horizontal cart position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase, GrafanaDashboard
]

instance HoistPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series vertical hoist position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase, GrafanaDashboard
]

instance TimescaleDBDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization platform for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GantryLibPythonModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library for controlling gantry crane hardware components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance ArduinoSensorController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for managing sensor data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Motor controller hardware for precise control of stepper motors"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance Fusion360CADModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for crane structure design"
]

instance CapellaMBSE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool for system architecture design"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane structure created using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibPythonModule, CapellaMBSE
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibPythonModule
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics for predicting behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaMBSE
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls horizontal movement of the cart"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls vertical movement of the hoist"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Picks up and releases containers using magnetic force"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories for crane operation based on current state and constraints"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, MoveCartAction, MoveHoistAction, ActivateElectromagnetAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs crane state data to TimescaleDB for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time dashboard visualizations of crane operations using Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for prediction and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements against simulation results for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight, FaultDetectionAlert
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory recommendations for crane operation"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data for analysis and reporting"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualizations of crane state"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated crane dynamics results"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results comparing real-time data to simulations"
]

instance FaultDetectionAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts when validation thresholds are breached for fault detection"
]

instance MoveCartAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Moves the cart to a specified position"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MoveHoistAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Moves the hoist vertically to a specified position"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActivateElectromagnetAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activates or deactivates the electromagnet for container pickup"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GantryCraneDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartPositionSensor, HoistPositionSensor, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, TimescaleDBDatabase, GrafanaDashboard, MosquittoMQTTBroker, DockerContainerization, GantryLibPythonModule, ArduinoSensorController, TMC4671EvalMotorController, Fusion360CADModeling, CapellaMBSE, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, CraneCADModel, KinematicModel, CraneDynamicsSimulationModel, SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, CartPositionData, HoistPositionData, OptimalTrajectoryInsight, HistoricalDataInsight, RealTimeVisualizationInsight, SimulationInsight, ValidationInsight, FaultDetectionAlert, MoveCartAction, MoveHoistAction, ActivateElectromagnetAction
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for movement trajectories generated by Trajectory Generator Service transmitted via Physical Crane Interface to control physical motors."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization with real-time data logging and validation, where measurements are compared against simulations in near real-time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "C4 Model-based architecture with physical components (crane, interface, control app, logging app, HMI) and digital services (DB, dashboard, trajectory gen, simulation, validation, MQTT broker) interconnected via MQTT and database, deployed on a single PC using Docker."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as-operated), used for fault detection and continuous validation during crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between measured and simulated trajectories, comparing against predefined thresholds to ensure model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto broker for inter-service communication and data exchange."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized services (TimescaleDB, MQTT broker, Grafana) deployed on a personal computer with gantrylib Python module installed via pip."
]
